With one arg (profile name), prints the current TTL.
With two args, upserts the TTL for that profile. Pass 'none' or '-' as
the days value to clear the TTL (memories will then never expire
unless expires_at is set at store time).

Usage:
  ogham profile ttl <profile> [<days>] [flags]

Flags:
  -h, --help   help for ttl

Global Flags:
      --python          Alias for --sidecar
  -q, --quiet           Suppress stderr informational notices (sidecar fallback message)
      --sidecar         Route through the Python MCP sidecar for the full retrieval pipeline (intent detection, strided retrieval, query reformulation, graph augmentation). Default is the fast native Go path.
      --text            Human-readable output (default is JSON for LLM / script consumption)
  -v, --verbose count   Increase stderr log verbosity (-v = info, -vv = debug)
